search_query: latest Python libraries for machine learning
retrieved_result: Will my NETGEAR router work with Verizon FiOS? Your NETGEAR router will not replace your existing FiOS router/gateway device. However, it will be able to work in conjunction with the FiOS device in one of two ways. Option 1: The FiOS device can provide router functions while the NETGEAR router works as AP mode only to provide wireless access
Decision_Reason: The retrieved result discusses router compatibility with Verizon FiOS, which is unrelated to Python libraries or machine learning.
